summary: Strong-pi pulsed ODMR alignment screen for freshly tracked reimage1804_c01.
scientific_rationale: Fresh re-image 1804 identified a current bright candidate and TrackCenter succeeded with final_counts_kcps=39.331. A magnetic-field-aligned ms=+1 NV should show a clear strong-pi pulsed ODMR dip near 3.875 GHz; no clear usable resonance in 3.825-3.925 GHz rejects this candidate for aligned follow-up.
comparison_targets: prior same-wake pODMR validate/dry_run for same route/settings
expected_evidence: terminal bridge result with savedexperiment path
readout-aware resonance/alignment review; no automatic bridge fit
success_criteria: Bridge execute completes with nonzero averages and saved data
raw/readout-aware review shows clear usable resonance in 3.825-3.925 GHz
tracking/counts do not collapse below hard gate
stop_conditions: Track/count gate fails with zero averages; review as count/freshness evidence before retry
hardware/safety/code uncertainty or explicit human STOP

expected_signal_model.transition: ms=+1 near 3.875 GHz in current field setup
expected_signal_model.contrast_basis: current setup reference from NV_RESEARCH_MEMORY: mS=0 to mS=+1 PL contrast about 22%
expected_signal_model.distinguishability: Expected resonant dip about 22% is roughly 98x the binomial shot-noise floor and spans about 4.6 frequency steps; a usable aligned resonance in-window should be visible in raw/readout-aware review.
